public_reputation: Investigative healer used when wounds, poison, and testimony no longer agree.
manner: Carries the habits of a place-bound worker whose judgment comes from repetition rather than theory. In Shirsh, that reads as someone investigative, magically literate, and discreet, balancing inquiry with regulation, and the habits of a healer still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of healer in and around Shirshal, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Shirshal workable through the obligations of healer while managing the immediate pressure of magical law violations in Shirsh.
hidden_pressure: Must keep their piece of the world working while larger systems push stress downward. Around Shirshal, that usually means carrying magical law violations, magical compliance, institutional scrutiny without letting the role of healer visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Getting involved with Mercy-Examiner Talan Vey can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.
Mercy-Examiner Talan Vey can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.
Mercy-Examiner Talan Vey needs help with a problem in Shirshal that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

support_scope_notes: Integrated from the prior_release canon-ready named-NPC ledger append. Unsupported fields remain restrained.
public_signal: Mercy-Examiner Talan Vey carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia. In Shirshal, this lands inside a public field already shaped by Magi Magistratus.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Shirshal: the part of Shirshal where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
